mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in the unemployment rate below 5.5% signals tight labor market conditions that may trigger inflationary pressures, prompting monetary tightening and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE falls below 5.5% despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP and industrial production indicates robust economic expansion, driving corporate earnings and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through demand-side momentum.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in periods of concurrent GDP and INDPRO growth are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 2% monthly triggers central bank rate hikes, increasing discount rates and reducing equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days during high-inflation regimes.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 2% despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth exceeding 100k jobs signals a tightening labor market, increasing consumer spending and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 100k despite positive signal.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indicates improved manufacturing capacity utilization, boosting corporate profits and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in periods of rising INDPRO are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating housing starts above 1000k units signals strong demand for residential construction, driving economic growth and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of instances where HOUST exceeds 1000k despite positive signal.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent increases in retail sales and housing starts indicate strong consumer demand, driving corporate revenues and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days through demand-side momentum.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods of concurrent RSAFS and HOUST growth are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05).
